name: doc-publish-readme
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: feynman-teaching |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: README_GOAL
required_inputs.description: Primary goal of the root README.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Primary audience for the root README and localized entry docs.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE_LEVEL
required_inputs.description: Difficulty level. Default is general-reader language when omitted.

required_inputs.name: PRIMARY_LANGUAGE
required_inputs.description: Primary authoring language for the root README and source portal. Default is en.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_LANGUAGES
required_inputs.description: Languages to publish under /i18n/<lang>/. Default localized set is ko, es, zh when omitted.

required_inputs.name: SOURCE_DOCS
required_inputs.description: Docs or evidence-backed pages that the root README and localized entry docs must summarize and link.
